identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a high-authority, mission-critical traffic management system for Angola that balances professional severity with modern usability.
identity.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority) + The Performance Pro (Command Center)

usage_rules.headings: Uppercase or Sentence Case. Tight tracking (-0.02em). Weight 600 or 700.
usage_rules.body: High legibility. Relaxed line-height (1.6). Weight 400 or 500.
usage_rules.data_values: Use Monospace for coordinates, license plates, and rapid-change numbers.

gradients.forbidden: No full-screen gradients. No 'SaaS' purple/teal gradients.
gradients.allowed: Subtle 'Hazard' stripes for critical alerts only.

layout.spacing_system: Generous padding (p-6, p-8) for containers. Dense spacing (gap-2, gap-4) for data grids.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density). 12-column base. Widgets span 3, 4, or 6 columns.
grid_system.map_view: Full-screen map canvas. Floating glass panels for controls (z-index 50).

container_styles.card: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-lg
container_styles.floating_panel: bg-white/90 dark:bg-slate-900/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-200/50 shadow-lg rounded-xl

buttons.style: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Uppercase text for primary actions.

inputs.style: High contrast borders. Focus ring: Blue-500.
inputs.validation: Error states must use Red-600 text and border.

cards.dashboard_widget: Header with icon + title. Body with large metric or chart. Footer with trend.
cards.incident_card: Left border color-coded by severity (Red=Critical, Orange=Major, Yellow=Minor).

maps.style: Custom JSON style to remove commercial POIs and emphasize roads/traffic.
maps.markers: Custom SVG markers for Accident, Police, Roadblock.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for map overlays only. Backdrop-blur-md + bg-white/80.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Crisp, diffuse shadows. shadow-lg for floating elements.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are preferred over shadows for structure.

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly (0.98) on click. Hover lifts cards (-2px).
motion.loading: Skeleton loaders for data. Spinner for actions.

accessibility.contrast: APCA compliant. Text on colored badges must be white or dark slate.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a serious, professional tool. No playful animations. Focus on data density and clarity.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: The dashboard is a Command Center. It should feel like a pilot's cockpit. Critical info (Accidents, Deaths, Traffic Jams) must be top-level.
instructions_to_main_agent.map: The map is the core. Ensure it takes up maximum screen real estate when in 'Map Mode'.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Accident reporting forms are long. Use multi-step wizards or accordions to manage complexity.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile: Mobile view is for citizens. It should be simpler: 'Report Accident', 'View Map', 'Emergency Call'.

universal_guidelines.no_gradients: Do not use gradients for backgrounds or buttons unless specified.
universal_guidelines.no_centering: Do not center text in cards unless it's a single big number.
universal_guidelines.data_density: Avoid excessive whitespace in data tables. Use compact rows.
universal_guidelines.testing: Add data-testid to every button, input, and link.
